title: Kidplokio 28pc Construction Toys Tool Box Work Bench Playset for Boys, Ages 3

Kidplokio 28pc Construction Toys Tool Box Work Bench Playset for Boys, Ages 3

Calling all little repairmen, this Kidplokio Tools and Tool Box Work Bench playset allows for exciting DIY and fixer-upper pretend play! Kids will love setting up their work bench and tackling projects around the house, workshop, garage and more with Mom, Dad, family and friends.

Designed with small hands in mind, little grease monkeys can enjoy hours of pretend play with this perfectly sized kids’ tools and work bench kit; the construction power tools playset is a great way to activate imagination and creativity, giving little one’s confidence to take on any project. And, not only will this fun tools and tool box work bench playset provide little ones with hours of imaginative cosplay and creativity, it will also engage their cognitive problem solving skills and help to develop fine motor skills too!

Key Features

  • TOOLS AND TOOL BOX WORK BENCH PLAYSET: Calling all little repairmen, this Kidplokio Tools and Tool Box Work Bench playset allows for exciting DIY and fixer-upper pretend play! Kids will love setting up their work bench and tackling projects around the house, workshop, garage and more
  • FUN PRETEND PLAY WITH TOOLS: Designed with small hands in mind, little grease monkeys can enjoy hours of pretend play with this perfectly sized kids’ tools and work bench kit; the construction power tools playset is a great way to activate imagination and creativity, giving little one’s confidence to take on any project
  • TODDLER LEARNING TOYS: And, not only will this fun construction toys or building toys playset provide little ones with hours of imaginative cosplay and creativity, it will also engage their cognitive problem solving skills and help to develop fine motor skills, dexterity and hand-eye coordination too!
  • NEAT AND TIDY STORAGE: All the tools included in this kids work bench playset fit perfectly back into the included tool box for easy storage, organization and to ensure nothing gets lost! Snapping securely closed and featuring a built-in handle for carrying, the tool box work bench playset is also ideal for family travel
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 10 x 8.5 x 4 inches; Weight: 1.50lbs; Color: Yellow; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPLA039CX
  • UPC: 810058481573
  • Color: Yellow
  • Size: Medium

All the tools included in this kids work bench playset fit perfectly back into the included tool box for easy storage, organization and to ensure nothing gets lose! Don’t worry about tripping over pieces or losing them, when kids are done playing, everything packs away nicely into the tool box until they're ready to play again.

Snapping securely closed and featuring a built-in handle for carrying, the tool box work bench playset is great for family travel and playdates, easily fitting in a backpack, tote bag or carry-on luggage when not in use.

Recommended Ages: 3+

Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts
